content.speakerText: Hey, you won't believe it—I just got promoted to team lead!
content.speakerTextCn: 嘿，你不敢相信，我刚升任团队主管了！

options.text: That's terrible! I hope you're happy now.
No way! That's awesome—you totally earned it!
Oh, I didn't know you were looking for a new job.
Maybe you should ask for a raise instead.

content.explanation: 正确答案 'No way! That's awesome—you totally earned it!' 是非正式场合中表达惊喜和真诚祝贺的地道回应。干扰项1语气负面，不符合祝贺场景；干扰项3暗示对方在找工作，与升职事实矛盾；干扰项4建议加薪，偏离了祝贺的核心意图。

content.speakerText: Thanks! I pulled a lot of late nights, but it was worth it.
content.speakerTextCn: 谢谢！我熬了很多夜，但值了。

options.text: I know how hard you've been grinding—respect!
You should sleep more next time.
Did you get a bonus too?
I guess you had no choice.

content.explanation: 正确答案 'I know how hard you've been grinding—respect!' 使用了地道词汇 'grinding' 来认可对方的努力，并用 'respect' 表达敬佩，符合语境。干扰项1是建议休息，削弱了祝贺氛围；干扰项3转向利益，显得功利；干扰项4暗示被迫加班，否定对方的主动性。

content.speakerText: I just got promoted to senior manager!

options.text: Wow, that’s incredible! All your dedication really showed.
So now you’ll be working less, right?
I heard the boss was unhappy with you last month.
Congratulations, but are you sure you’re ready?

content.explanation: 正确答案 'Wow, that’s incredible! All your dedication really showed.' 表达了真诚的赞美并强调了对方的付出，符合祝贺场景。干扰项1暗示升职后会轻松，与常理不符；干扰项3制造负面回忆，破坏气氛；干扰项4质疑能力，属于不恰��的质疑，不符合社交礼仪。

content.template: No way! That's awesome—you totally ___ it!
content.hint: 表达‘你完全配得上’的地道搭配

content.template: I know how hard you've been ___—respect!
content.hint: 口语中表示‘拼命干’的地道动词
content.knowledgePoint: 场景高频俚语（grinding = 拼命努力）

content.template: Congratulations! All your hard work finally ___ off.
content.hint: 表示‘努力得到回报’的固定搭配
content.knowledgePoint: 固定表达（pay off = 产生回报）

content.speakerText: Hey, you won't believe it—I just got promoted to team lead!
content.speakerTextCn: 嘿，你不敢相信，我刚升任团队主管了！
expectedAnswers: No way! That's awesome—you totally earned it!
Congratulations! You've been working so hard, this is so well-deserved.
Wow, that's amazing! I've always known you'd rise to the top.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否表达了真诚的祝贺和惊喜
语言准确性：语法和词汇使用是否正确
表达自然度：是否符合非正式职场口语习惯
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 earned / hard work / deserved 等关键词

content.speakerText: Thanks! I pulled a lot of late nights, but it was worth it.
content.speakerTextCn: 谢谢！我熬了很多夜，但值了。
expectedAnswers: I know how hard you've been grinding—respect!
You’ve always been so dedicated; this is just the beginning of bigger things.
All those late nights really paid off—you deserve every bit of this!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否认可对方的努力并给予积极反馈
语言准确性：是否正确使用了 grinding / dedicated / paid off 等表达
表达自然度：是否自然流畅，避免机械背诵
关键词覆盖：是否包含努力、回报、未来期待等核心语义

content.speakerText: I just got promoted to senior manager!
expectedAnswers: That’s incredible! Your leadership has always stood out.
Wow, you’ve crushed it—this promotion is long overdue!
Huge congrats! I’ve seen how much you’ve sacrificed—this is just the start.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否表达祝贺并肯定对方成就
语言准确性：语法和词汇是否得体，避免错误搭配
表达自然度：是否使用了地道的职场口语表达
关键词覆盖：是否包含 leadership / sacrifice / standout / overdue 等相关词汇
